537 ANTPSYCT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD ANTPSYCT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antipsychotic (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used,

1 = Yes
